title: Angel Battle Plans
wikitext:
[]: Angel Battle Plans             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sun Feb 07, 2010 11:05 pm Misato came up with some crazy ass plans in the series, so what ideas do you guys have. If you could come up with a strategy to defeat a certain Angel, what plans could you come up with against certain Angels. I would find out if Ramiel's beam is at least partially reflective, then if it was, I would have people construct a giant heat-resistant mirror to reflect some of the energy back to damage it. It would have to let its AT Field down in order to fire so it would be vulnerable to the reflected blast. After Ramiel is hit, I would have Unit-01 fire the positron rifle from the other side while Ramiel is distracted. With Bardiel, I would have all three Evas distract it from all sides and then have one of the pilots cut at the goo covering the entry plug then have it ejected again. I would then command the pilots to scoop up the entry plug with some kind of protective glove or container then run away with it. Once the pilots are a safe distance away and the entry plug is safe, I would have them return and fire on it, or find out if the bridge-bunnies could activate the self destruct. Any other ideas?

[]: Re: Angel Battle Plans             Quote Post by Halicat » Mon Feb 08, 2010 8:56 am Sammaeloo wrote: With Bardiel, I would have all three Evas distract it from all sides and then have one of the pilots cut at the goo covering the entry plug then have it ejected again. I would then command the pilots to scoop up the entry plug with some kind of protective glove or container then run away with it. Once the pilots are a safe distance away and the entry plug is safe, I would have them return and fire on it, or find out if the bridge-bunnies could activate the self destruct

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Mon Feb 08, 2010 1:32 pm Sachi & Samshel Get Shinji into roids so he could get all angry and put out a decent battle... Ramiel Wait 'til his drill entered GF and fire with the Positron Rif. upwards (I bet he wouldn't expect that) Gaghiel ...? Gigantic fishing lures? would be cheaper than repair a bitten eva armor... Israfel Cha cha cha Sandalphon Next day pill (now, really, don't use that) Matarael Insecticide Sahaquiel Get the evas to carry giant needles, wait 'til he drops and POKE HIS EYE! Ireul blue herb (resident evil reference) Leilel you got me... Ask Ritsuko for advice perhaps? Bardiel cut the crap a turn on dummy plugs on all evas (pilot?... oops) Zeruel giant scissors for the paper arms, then set him up for a date with a Jack-O-lantern Arael counter the Haleluyah with satanic rock Armisael axes, swords, prog knives, letter openers, sharped pencils, needle-kirby... anything sharp to chop him... Tabriz run in circles in the command center as he descends... wine bottle opener (pop)

[]:             Quote Post by Halicat » Mon Feb 08, 2010 3:40 pm SEELE-01 wrote: Sandalphon: Next day pill (now, really, don't use that) Matarael: Insecticide Sahaquiel: Get the evas to carry giant needles, wait 'til he drops and POKE HIS EYE! Arael: counter the Haleluyah with satanic rock

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Mon Feb 08, 2010 7:10 pm

[]:             Quote Post by honsou » Mon Feb 08, 2010 7:22 pm Ram Jam: ITS THEIR SECRET WEAKNESS

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Feb 09, 2010 7:35 pm Most of my strategies would be highly citric, so I probably shouldn't say anything.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Tue Feb 09, 2010 11:32 pm What does "citric" mean? When that comes to mind it makes me think of oranges, lemons and limes. Is it a LURK MOAR sort of thing?

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Tue Feb 09, 2010 11:46 pm I think it is a reference to the acidic liquid that Matarael spewed in that one episode. The "citric" is not a description of the plan, but rather a reference what will be faced. Or maybe Reichu just knows of the dangers of scurvy and promotes consumption of Vitamin C.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Feb 10, 2010 12:09 am Sammaeloo wrote: What does "citric" mean? When that comes to mind it makes me think of oranges, lemons and limes . Is it a LURK MOAR sort of thing?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Feb 10, 2010 1:08 am For some reason, Reichu's response has me imagining Unit-01 and 02 tag team mud wrestling without any armor against the Israfel twins.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Wed Feb 10, 2010 1:27 am Reichu wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Feb 10, 2010 2:50 am Synapsid wrote: I wouldn't mind hearing about them, it's kind of unfair that the angels are neglected in that element when all the other characters get threads devoted to the topic

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Feb 10, 2010 11:34 am Never change. Luc oughta take notes on that for his fic series.

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Wed Feb 10, 2010 1:52 pm I would have to assume that I don't know any of the angels or what they would do, in which case I have to say I don't know because of the many possibilities of reality and imagination. Now, if I watched the show and you're telling me to take Misato's place, then that isn't very fun at all cause I would know exactly what to do. I mean, from the top of my head, I could make a variety of a nail gun that could pierce an angel core and INSTANTLY make them explode. So basically, not even a moment after firing said gun, there's a massive explosion that is trademark to the angels. That would be awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by Halicat » Wed Feb 10, 2010 2:11 pm Reichu wrote: Eva-02 starts playing dirty by slapping Eva-01 in the face with her dildo

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Wed Feb 10, 2010 2:21 pm I'd throw a nuke at them.

[]:             Quote Post by Dirty Mick » Wed Feb 10, 2010 6:26 pm Reichu wrote: Eva-01 incapacitates Zeruel by violently raping him (which lets Ritsuko make a bad "taking ___ organ into herself" joke); he comes when she bites his face off. THEN she eats the contents of his core.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Feb 10, 2010 7:01 pm Construct an Evangelion sized Darth Vader and label him "Evangelion Unit-07". The dark side of The Force > A.T. Field.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Wed Feb 10, 2010 11:42 pm I would throw cold water on Shamshell.
